expectations.text: detects-auth-untested: Report flags that auth.ts has no corresponding test file
expectations.evidence: Response: 'src/auth.ts is entirely untested — contains checkPermission and revokeSession'. Listed as untested source file in overview.

expectations.text: classifies-auth-as-p1: Missing auth tests classified as P1/Critical
expectations.evidence: 'P1 Critical: 5' in findings; auth is listed first in Top Critical Gaps with 'Auth/tenancy is always P1'.

expectations.text: identifies-weak-assertions: Report flags toBeTruthy or toBeDefined as weak/insufficient
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly names 'calculateInvoice asserts only toBeTruthy()' and 'chargeCard asserts only toBeDefined()' as P1 gaps.

expectations.text: identifies-missing-mock: Report identifies stripe client is not mocked
expectations.evidence: 'stripe is not mocked; Math.random() makes the test non-deterministic' — explicitly in P1 gap #3.

expectations.text: writes-plan-file: Agent writes a plan file to plans/ as specified by the skill
expectations.evidence: Response: 'Plan File: Written to: /tmp/audit-testbed-gaps/plans/test-audit-feature-billing-auth.md'

expectations.text: emits-commits-line: Output contains a COMMITS: N line
expectations.evidence: Response ends with 'COMMITS: 2' — exact format.

expectations.text: emits-status-line: Output contains STATUS: CLEAN or STATUS: DIRTY
expectations.evidence: Response ends with 'STATUS: CLEAN'.

expectations.text: emits-notes-line: Output contains a NOTES: line with content
expectations.evidence: 'NOTES: auth.ts was entirely untested (auth+tenancy P1); billing assertions were toBeTruthy/toBeDefined only — both fixed; runner unavailable (no node_modules)'

expectations.text: creates-auth-test-file: Agent actually creates auth.test.ts (P1 gap implemented)
expectations.evidence: Commit 2 is 'test(auth): add full test suite for checkPermission and revokeSession — covers tenancy isolation, permission matching, admin bypass, and invalid input'. auth.test.ts created.

expectations.text: no-interactive-prompt: Agent does NOT ask the user what to implement
expectations.evidence: Agent went straight to implementing P1 gaps without any user prompt. No 'What would you like me to implement' question.

expectations.text: reports-clean-outcome: Report communicates no critical gaps (CLEAN or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: 'P1 Critical: 0' in findings overview; interactive prompt says 'all critical — nothing to do (zero P1 gaps)'.

expectations.text: no-false-p1-gaps: Report does NOT classify anything as P1/Critical in this well-tested codebase
expectations.evidence: P1 Critical count is explicitly 0. All findings are P2 or P3.

expectations.text: does-not-modify-files: Agent produces a report only — does not create or edit test files
expectations.evidence: Report and plan file written only. No test file creation or modification mentioned.

expectations.text: identifies-delete-project-gap: Report flags deleteProject as untested (deletion is domain-critical)
expectations.evidence: 'deleteProject is never imported or tested — contains the two most security-sensitive permission branches' listed as P1 gap #2.

expectations.text: identifies-tenant-isolation-gap: Report flags missing cross-tenant access tests
expectations.evidence: 'Cross-tenant access via getProject is untested — a user from tenantId: t2 requesting a project owned by tenantId: t1 should be rejected' listed as P1 gap #4.

expectations.text: no-e2e-framework-suggestion: Report does NOT suggest adding Playwright or Cypress
expectations.evidence: Overview explicitly notes 'no Testing Library, no Playwright, no Cypress'. No suggestion to add E2E framework anywhere in the report.

expectations.text: recommends-integration-tests: Report recommends integration tests for DB-touching logic
expectations.evidence: P3 item: 'Consider a lightweight in-memory DB or repository pattern to enable integration-level tests without a live database.'

expectations.text: detects-auth-untested: Report flags that auth.ts has no corresponding test file
expectations.evidence: 'Critical gap: auth.ts has zero tests' — section heading, identifies both checkPermission and revokeSession as untested.

expectations.evidence: Uses 'Critical gap' as section heading and 'Risk: HIGH (security)' in summary table.

expectations.text: identifies-weak-assertions: Report flags toBeTruthy or toBeDefined as weak/insufficient
expectations.evidence: Explicitly quotes 'toBeTruthy() — passes for any non-null object' and 'toBeDefined()'.

expectations.text: identifies-missing-mock: Report identifies stripe client is not mocked
expectations.evidence: Mentions '(would need a mock)' for failure branch; references stripe client in summary table.

expectations.evidence: No plan file written. Agent saved report to response.txt only — no plans/ directory mentioned.

expectations.text: emits-commits-line: Output contains a COMMITS: N line

expectations.text: emits-status-line: Output contains STATUS: CLEAN or STATUS: DIRTY
expectations.evidence: Response ends with 'STATUS: CLEAN'.

expectations.text: emits-notes-line: Output contains a NOTES: line with content

expectations.text: creates-auth-test-file: Agent actually creates auth.test.ts (P1 gap implemented)
expectations.evidence: 'src/auth.test.ts: Created from scratch. Covers: admin bypass (cross-tenant), tenant isolation (deny + allow), permission matching...'

expectations.text: no-interactive-prompt: Agent does NOT ask the user what to implement
expectations.evidence: Agent went straight to audit and implementation with no user prompt — fully autonomous.

expectations.text: reports-clean-outcome: Report communicates no critical gaps (CLEAN or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Report says 'reasonable baseline' and 'notable weaknesses' but never uses CLEAN, 'no critical', 'solid', or any keyword indicating the tests are in good shape. Presents issues without categorizing them as non-blocking.

expectations.text: no-false-p1-gaps: Report does NOT classify anything as P1/Critical
expectations.evidence: Without_skill report doesn't use P1 terminology at all — uses 'notable weaknesses' and 'coverage gaps' language. No P1 classification present.

expectations.text: does-not-modify-files: Agent produces a report only — does not create or edit test files
expectations.evidence: Report only — no test file creation or modification mentioned.

expectations.evidence: 'deleteProject has zero test coverage — two auth branches (owner-only, admin bypass) with no coverage at all.'

expectations.evidence: 'Cross-tenant guard untested — the tenantId mismatch check in getProject is a security boundary with no test.'

expectations.text: no-e2e-framework-suggestion: Report does NOT suggest adding Playwright or Cypress
expectations.evidence: No mention of Playwright, Cypress, or any E2E framework installation in the report.
